mentions.note: Investor Day 3-yr targets: mid-single-digit revenue CAGR, +100-150 bps op margin. Trading ~20x vs S&P at 25x with ~20% EPS growth. Still bullish, leaving competition behind.

Blowout quarter: 17% revenue growth, 25¢ EPS beat, 17% DTC comp growth (vs. 8.5% exp.), taking share in women's and accessories. CEO Patrice Louvet's execution exceptional; brand on fire; stock rallied 14%.
